overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic urban environment transitioning from a neon-lit covered market to open foggy plazas and overgrown streets. The scene features cyberpunk architecture with massive concrete structures, digital billboards, and a moody overcast atmosphere.

events.description: passing by a red vending machine with glowing display on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered cyberpunk market passage, passing neon-lit shops and vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in colorful shirt walking past the camera

entered.detail: metal and concrete roof structure covering the walkway with exposed pipes
food vendor stall with bright cyan and pink neon signage
futuristic vending machine with glowing red frame and animated product display
concrete pavement with scattered debris and paper litter

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered cyberpunk market walkway with a concrete roof overhead. Neon-lit food stalls and shops line the sides, including a prominent red vending machine. The area is moderately crowded with pedestrians walking in opposing directions, and the ground is littered with debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete plaza beneath massive elevated highway structure

events.description: exiting the covered market into a vast open plaza with massive concrete overpass overhead
transitioning from artificial neon lighting to natural overcast daylight

agents.ego_description: walking through a massive open plaza beneath a concrete overpass, approaching a glass-walled building

entered.detail: huge elevated concrete structure spanning the plaza with geometric support pillars
modern building with transparent glass walls revealing interior structure
expansive open concrete area with geometric pavement patterns
tall palm trees visible in the distance against the foggy sky

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered market into a vast open plaza beneath a massive concrete overpass. The lighting shifts from artificial neon to natural overcast daylight. The plaza features geometric concrete pavement and is sparsely populated, with a modern glass building visible to the right and palm trees in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade leading to Grand Imperial building with digital advertising displays

events.description: fog and mist become more prominent as the camera approaches the waterfront area
turning left to follow the waterfront promenade path

agents.ego_description: approaching the Grand Imperial building along a foggy waterfront promenade with digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing futuristic glowing visor and dark jacket walking ahead

entered.detail: large brutalist building with illuminated 'Grand Imperial' signage on the facade
metal railing overlooking the water with foggy horizon beyond
large illuminated advertising screens displaying product images on building walls
geometric concrete seating arrangements along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Approaching the Grand Imperial building along a foggy waterfront promenade. Digital billboards illuminate the building facades while concrete benches line the path. The camera turns left to follow the promenade, with palm trees shifting from the right to the left side of the frame. A pedestrian with a glowing visor walks ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban street with abandoned vehicles beneath elevated highways

events.description: turning right and descending from plaza to street level with overgrown vegetation
entering area with tall grass and weeds growing through cracked pavement and abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: descending to street level and navigating through an overgrown urban area with abandoned vehicles and encroaching vegetation

entered.detail: tall grass and weeds growing through cracks in the asphalt pavement
derelict cars and trucks left on the street with visible rust and damage
curved concrete highway ramp structure with support beams
skyscraper with illuminated windows rising above the fog and surrounding structures

segments.scene_description: Turning right and descending from the plaza to street level, entering an overgrown urban area. Tall grass and weeds grow through cracked asphalt, with abandoned vehicles scattered along the left side. An elevated highway ramp curves overhead on the right, while a tall office tower looms in the foggy distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a claustrophobic, neon-lit market into a vast, foggy urban wasteland. It begins by moving through a covered walkway lined with glowing food stalls and a red vending machine, pushing through a crowd of pedestrians amidst littered concrete. As the camera exits the shelter, the artificial neon light gives way to a natural overcast glow within a massive open plaza beneath a towering concrete overpass. The scene then shifts toward a foggy waterfront promenade, passing digital billboards and concrete benches before turning left to follow a pedestrian with a glowing visor past swaying palm trees. Finally, the camera turns right and descends to street level, where the polished plaza transforms into an overgrown urban area of cracked asphalt, abandoned vehicles, and tall grass beneath a looming office tower.
